title: senecio deliculatus
intro: Senecio deliculatus, also known as Kangaroo Fern, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio deliculatus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio deliculatus may include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
